items.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
items.whyYouShouldCare: The entry of a Solana community lead into UK politics highlights the potential for blockchain transparency to influence governance and public trust.

items.title: Alameda Research moves $15.1M in SOL – Can Solana hold $70?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Alameda Research's significant movement of SOL raises questions about market stability and the potential impact on Solana's price support at the $70 level.

items.title: CFTC says states cannot force Kalshi to cancel executed trades
items.whyYouShouldCare: The CFTC's ruling on Kalshi reinforces the regulatory landscape for trading platforms, which could affect liquidity and operational strategies within the crypto space.
